meta.description: Hanbang (Korean medicine) skincare ingredients with constitutional compatibility ratings

rating_scale.highly_beneficial: Actively addresses this type's constitutional needs
rating_scale.beneficial: Compatible and supportive for this type
rating_scale.neutral: Neither helpful nor harmful in normal amounts
rating_scale.caution: May aggravate this type's constitutional imbalance in high concentrations
rating_scale.avoid: Contradicts this type's constitutional needs; likely to cause adverse reactions

meta.note: The Korean government requires products labeled as hanbang to contain at least 1% traditional Korean medicinal herbs.

tae-yang.reason: Excessively warming for the hottest constitution. Can cause irritation, redness, and inflammation.

so-yang.reason: Adds unwanted heat. Can trigger breakouts, redness, and sensitivity in already hot skin.

tae-eum.reason: Moderate warming supports circulation in skin prone to dullness. Use in combination with other ingredients.

so-eum.reason: Provides essential warmth and Qi to cold, pale, devitalized skin. Improves circulation and resilience.

ingredients.primary_action: Stronger than white ginseng: deep anti-aging, intense firming, circulation boost

tae-yang.reason: Even more heating than white ginseng. Strictly contraindicated.

so-yang.reason: Too heating. Will worsen heat-related skin issues.

tae-eum.reason: Can be used carefully in small amounts for anti-aging, but monitor for congestion.

so-eum.reason: The deepest warming tonic for skin. Excellent for severely cold, devitalized skin.

ingredients.primary_action: Soothing, barrier repair, anti-inflammatory, wound healing

tae-yang.reason: Cooling and soothing — perfect for a hot constitution that needs calming.

so-yang.reason: Directly addresses heat, redness, and inflammation that So-Yang skin is prone to.

tae-eum.reason: Good for skin barrier support and calming any inflammation.

so-eum.reason: Not harmful but doesn't address the core need for warming. Use in combination with warming ingredients.

tae-yang.reason: Cooling antioxidant that supports hot constitutions.

so-yang.reason: Excellent for cooling, controlling oil, and reducing inflammation.

tae-eum.reason: Antioxidant benefits with gentle detoxifying properties support circulation.

so-eum.reason: Cooling nature may be too cold for sensitive So-Eum skin, especially in high concentrations.

tae-yang.reason: Warming nature may be too much. Use only in highly diluted, cooling formulations.

so-yang.reason: Mugwort's anti-inflammatory benefits are useful, but its warming nature requires careful formulation for hot types.

tae-eum.reason: Promotes circulation and dispersal — exactly what sluggish Tae-Eum skin needs.

so-eum.reason: Warming, circulation-boosting, and calming. Perfect match for cold constitutions.

ingredients.primary_action: Brightening, anti-inflammatory, harmonizing (used to balance other herbs)

tae-yang.reason: Neutral nature makes it safe. Anti-inflammatory and brightening benefits useful.

so-yang.reason: Calming and harmonizing. Helps reduce redness without adding heat.

tae-eum.reason: Harmonizing effect supports other active ingredients.

so-eum.reason: Neutral and gentle. Safe for sensitive So-Eum skin as a supporting ingredient.

tae-yang.reason: Cooling and detoxifying — useful for clearing heat from skin.

so-yang.reason: Directly targets heat-related acne and inflammation that So-Yang types experience.

tae-eum.reason: Helps with pore congestion and body acne common in Tae-Eum types.

so-eum.reason: Cool nature may be too cold for already cold constitutions. Use sparingly if needed.

tae-yang.reason: Cooling and calming — ideal for the hottest constitution.

so-yang.reason: Gentle cooling with moisturizing benefits. Excellent for sensitive, hot skin.

tae-eum.reason: Pore-refining properties useful for larger-pored Tae-Eum skin.

so-eum.reason: Not harmful but the cooling nature doesn't match So-Eum's warming needs.

tae-yang.reason: Hot herb on the hottest constitution — will cause irritation and inflammation.

so-yang.reason: Adds fire to an already hot type. Can trigger redness, breakouts, sensitivity.

tae-eum.reason: Warming boost to circulation helps combat dullness and stagnation.

so-eum.reason: Provides essential warming that cold constitutions deeply need. Boosts circulation to pale skin.

so-yang.reason: Helps balance moisture and control blemishes without adding heat.

tae-eum.reason: Drains dampness, minimizes pores, and brightens dull skin — targets all Tae-Eum concerns.

so-eum.reason: Cool and draining nature may deplete moisture and warmth from already dry, cold skin.
